description: Deterministic static capture receipt for promotion review; no screenshots, browser automation, network, or JavaScript execution required.
finance_safety_boundaries: Static local research notes only; no live market data is fetched.
Not investment advice and not a buy, sell, hold, or allocation recommendation.
No broker integration, order routing, execution, or account access.
Scores are deterministic review aids for human research triage.
